hero.headline: Since 1989.
hero.sub: We build software that works. Sometimes software that surprises.

events.text: Poland is born. So are we.
We pivot to office software. Nobody is excited.
We survive Y2K. The millennium bug. The payroll system too. As did the bugs in the wall panelling...
The printer incident. Details sealed by mutual agreement.
We buy a ping-pong table. Nobody plays ping-pong. Should have bought a foosball table...
Marta joins. As cover. She doesn't know it yet, but she'll stay.
Pandemic. We already worked remotely, so essentially nothing happened.
Hania builds Skill Issue on a Friday afternoon.
Bożenka notices. "Hm. This is actually good."
Julka joins. Skill Issue goes live.

bozena.name: Bożenka from HR
bozena.title: Head of HR & Administration
bozena.bio: Has outlasted four CEOs, two office moves, and the printer incident. Does not accept CVs with the word "passionate". Does not use the word "passionate".
bozena.quote: CEOs come and go. I stay.

marta.name: Marta
marta.title: Head of Product
marta.bio: Was supposed to stay two years. She's still here. Makes roadmaps, manages clients, runs Secret Santa with a spreadsheet that has conditional formatting.

julka.name: Julka from HR
julka.title: HR Specialist
julka.bio: Joined straight from university. Has already reorganised three processes. Runs a Notion board nobody uses. Has a doc called "suggestions (please read)" — Marta has opened it twice.

hania.name: Hania Sikorska
hania.title: Mid-level Developer
hania.quote: Hania is still water. She carves the banks.

office.label: Office software
office.text: We've been doing this for 30 years. It's stable, it works, our clients are satisfied. Which clients? They'd prefer not to be named.

skillIssue.label: Skill Issue
skillIssue.text: Hania built it on a Friday. Bożenka said we're taking it. Marta made a roadmap. Julka has feedback.

origin.title: How it started
origin.p1: Hania studied bioinformatics and joined Codexpol in 2022. Quiet in meetings. Opens PRs that make people ask: "when did she even do that?"
origin.p2: On a Friday afternoon in 2024, tired of watching her friends send CVs into the void and get nothing back, she built something. It was supposed to be a job listing scraper, so she told nobody.
origin.p3: Bożenka found it on Monday, in the internal tools folder, looking for the leave request system.
origin.quote: Hania is still water. She carves the banks.
origin.attribution: — Bożenka from HR, after Hania showed her Skill Issue

footer.copy: Codexpol Sp. z o.o. © 1989–2026. All rights reserved. Especially the ones from the 90s...
